fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`GRVkYcbcrComponents` specifies the Vulkan component swizzle mapping for each channel (R, G, B, A) in a YCbCr image conversion. Each property holds a Vulkan `VkComponentSwizzle` value that maps the corresponding channel to a source component. This struct is used as part of <xref:SkiaSharp.GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo> when creating Vulkan YCbCr sampler conversions for multi-planar image formats such as `VK_FORMAT_G8_B8R8_2PLANE_420_UNORM`.

## Examples

```csharp
var components = new GRVkYcbcrComponents
{
    R = 0, // VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY
    G = 0,
    B = 0,
    A = 0
};

var conversionInfo = new GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo
{
    Components = components,
    SupportsLinearFilter = true,
    SamplerFilterMustMatchChromaFilter = false
};
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents the Vulkan YCbCr component swizzle mapping for each color channel.
